inputs.label: Monthly Net Income
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly take-home pay after taxes. Based on personal finance standards (e.g., 50/30/20 rule).

inputs.label: Housing Cost
inputs.businessContext: Monthly rent or mortgage payment. Key fixed expense in budgeting.

inputs.label: Utilities Cost
inputs.businessContext: Monthly electricity, water, gas, internet. Based on average household data.

inputs.label: Food Cost
inputs.businessContext: Monthly grocery and dining expenses. USDA food plans reference.

inputs.label: Transportation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Monthly fuel, public transit, car maintenance. Bureau of Labor Statistics data.

inputs.label: Healthcare Cost
inputs.businessContext: Monthly insurance premiums, out-of-pocket expenses. Kaiser Family Foundation data.

inputs.label: Entertainment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Monthly spending on leisure, subscriptions, hobbies. Discretionary expense.

inputs.label: Monthly Savings Goal
inputs.businessContext: Target amount to save each month. Financial planning best practice.

inputs.label: Debt Payments
inputs.businessContext: Monthly minimum payments on loans, credit cards. Debt-to-income ratio reference.

inputs.label: Other Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Miscellaneous monthly costs not categorized above.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in accuracy of inputs. Affects adjusted outputs.

thresholds.housingCostRatio: housingCost / monthlyIncome > 0.3 -> 'Housing cost exceeds 30% of income, consider reducing.'
thresholds.savingsRate: savingsGoal / monthlyIncome < 0.1 -> 'Savings goal is below 10% of income, consider increasing.'
thresholds.debtRatio: debtPayments / monthlyIncome > 0.36 -> 'Debt payments exceed 36% of income, high risk.'
thresholds.totalExpensesRatio: totalExpenses / monthlyIncome > 0.9 -> 'Total expenses exceed 90% of income, budget is tight.'

formulas.totalExpenses: housingCost + utilitiesCost + foodCost + transportationCost + healthcareCost + entertainmentCost + debtPayments + otherExpenses
formulas.expenseBreakdown: {"housing": housingCost, "utilities": utilitiesCost, "food": foodCost, "transportation": transportationCost, "healthcare": healthcareCost, "entertainment": entertainmentCost, "debt": debtPayments, "other": otherExpenses}

suggestedActions: If housingCostRatio > 0.3: Consider refinancing or downsizing.
If savingsRate < 0.1: Increase savings goal or reduce expenses.
If debtRatio > 0.36: Prioritize debt repayment or consolidate.
If totalExpensesRatio > 0.9: Review and cut discretionary spending.
